uplink.description: Binary-sensor report (0x11) - contact closed, all detectors idle, 3.0 V
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame: report type 0x11, internal contact provisioned (FunctionEnable bit5, bytes[6]=0x20), BinarySensorReport all-clear, battery bytes[3]=30 -> 3.0 V. Expected derived from the upstream r315.js 0x11 parser (state byte 0 = idle), authoring contactState 'closed' per the vocabulary enum.

uplink.description: Binary-sensor report (0x11) - contact open (reed triggered), 3.0 V
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame: InternalContactSwitchSensorState (BinarySensorReport bit3) set -> bytes[8]=8. Netvox 1=triggered -> contactState 'open'. Verified against upstream r315.js 0x11 parser which computes InternalContactSwitchSensorState = (bytes[7]<<8|bytes[8])>>3&1 = 1 for this input.

uplink.description: Binary-sensor report (0x11) - contact open with low battery, PIR + tilt active
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame: battery byte 158 = 0x80|30 -> low-battery flag set, (158&0x7f)/10 = 3.0 V. BinarySensorReport low byte 13 = 0b1101 -> bit0 PIR, bit2 tilt, bit3 internal contact set. Matches upstream r315.js 0x11 bit assignments.

uplink.description: Device-info / startup frame (report type 0x00) - no measurement
uplink._note: Upstream example input (R315 startup version report). Authored as an error: it carries firmware/datecode metadata, not a measurement.

uplink.description: Config response on fPort 7 - no measurement
uplink._note: Upstream example input (ConfigReportRsp). fPort 7 is the config channel and carries no measurement.

uplink.description: Report type 0x01 (temperature/humidity) - not applicable to this device

errors: carries no measurement for this device

uplink._note: Upstream example input belonging to a T/H variant of the shared R315 codec. The R31501 has no temperature/humidity sensor (datasheet), so report type 0x01 is rejected.
